meaning: n.遗憾,悔恨,抱歉,歉意vt.为...感到遗憾,后悔,惋惜,哀悼,懊悔vi.感到抱歉
examples: I deeply regret what I said.
I came to regret my unconsidered remarks.
"We absolutely regret that that information wasn't passed on to the police, " he said.
Mr Johnson told those gathered that those responsible for the violence "face punishment they will bitterly, bitterly regret".
For a case study in the positive power of regret consider the case of Tom Cox.
